articles.title: Android rolling out AI-powered ‘Contextual suggestions’
articles.description: Google is using on-device AI to analyze how you use your Android phone and provide "Contextual suggestions."
articles.content:
Google is using on-device AI to analyze how you use your Android phone and provide “Contextual suggestions.”

articles.title: Chrome quietly installed 4GB of AI files on my PC - here’s how to remove them
articles.description: Google never really asked or notified users about this, and both Windows and macOS are affected.
articles.content: Just when you thought Google Chrome couldn't get more resource-intensive and invasive, it has quietly downloaded a massive AI-related file on systems running the browser. This includes both Windows and macOS, and the worst part, users were never aske... [5277 chars]

articles.title: Meta launches incognito mode for private AI chats on WhatsApp
articles.description: Meta has rolled out an incognito mode for WhatsApp AI chats, offering private, temporary conversations with disappearing messages and added privacy controls.
articles.content:
Meta Platforms said Wednesday it's rolling out an “incognito” mode for WhatsApp users to have private conversations with its AI chatbot, a move intended to ease privacy concerns about sensitive information that users share in chats.

articles.title: Anthropic finally beat OpenAI in business AI adoption - but 3 big threats could erase its lead
articles.description: Anthropic has overtaken OpenAI in U.S. business AI adoption, with more companies paying for Claude than ChatGPT as enterprise demand reshapes the AI market.
articles.content:
For the first time since the AI race began, more American businesses are paying for Anthropic's Claude than for OpenAI's ChatGPT.
Adoption of Anthropic rose 3.8% in April to 34.4% of businesses, according to the May 2026 release of the Ramp AI Index.... [10584 chars]
